properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v2 v3 v3 v2 v3 v2 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Consuming fire My heart's desire Oh, how I need You more A fresh outpour With no resistance I give permission So come now, invade my heart This life is Yours

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come fill me up, Holy Ghost Shine brighter till the whole world knows Your love Your love Come set me on a holy fire Burn bright until the whole world finds Your love Your love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: This is my one desire And only this I seek To be a living fire Consumed completely :/
